purpose: Historical planning artifact for the 'Convert XML Task Files to JSON' migration (predates current dashboards/{id}/plan.json convention). Documents the JSON schema that replaced the legacy XML master task file format (tasks/{date}/parallel_{name}.xml -> .json), enumerates ~47 files to edit grouped by priority (Core, Agent Protocol, Commands, Documentation, Other), terminology mapping ('master XML' -> 'master task file'), and execution strategy in batches. Stale: tasks/{date}/parallel_*.json is itself now deprecated in favor of dashboards/{id}/plan.json + initialization.json.
gotchas: Plan is HISTORICAL — describes the XML->JSON conversion that already happened. The post-conversion JSON schema (tasks/{date}/parallel_{name}.json) is itself now legacy/deprecated.
Current canonical plan format is dashboards/{id}/plan.json (different schema) — see .claude/skills/p-track/SKILL.md or agent/master/initialization_blueprint.md
Listed file paths reference repos at /Users/dean/Desktop/Working/Repos/Synapse — not the current /Users/dean/Desktop/Synapse layout
patterns: Migration plan pattern: schema-first, then file groupings, then terminology mapping
